preferred_skills: Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction analysis
Experiment design and statistical significance understanding
Familiarity with mobile app development lifecycle
Experience working with ML or AI-powered product features
responsibilities: Own and maintain the product roadmap, aligning feature priorities with business objectives, customer needs, and engineering capacity
Define clear product requirements and specifications through PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria that enable efficient engineering delivery
Lead customer discovery efforts through structured interviews, surveys, and usability testing to validate product hypotheses
Partner with engineering and design teams in sprint ceremonies including planning, retrospectives, and backlog refinement to ensure on-time delivery
Define, monitor, and report on product KPIs and success metrics using analytics tools to evaluate feature impact post-launch
Develop and execute go-to-market plans in collaboration with marketing, sales, and customer success teams for new product launches
Facilitate alignment across stakeholders by communicating roadmap status, trade-off decisions, and strategic rationale clearly and regularly
Conduct competitive analysis and monitor market trends to identify opportunities for product differentiation and innovation
Manage and prioritize the product backlog using frameworks such as RICE or MoSCoW to maximize engineering throughput and business value
Collaborate with data analysts to design and interpret A/B experiments, using results to drive iterative product improvements
